description: Reinsurance Associates LLC (RAL) portal development and management - Angular + Azure platform
tagline: System stability, governance, and architectural resilience for RAL Portal 2.0

items: Track releases with release_id, code_area, and risk_level fields
Document change approvals and risk assessments
Maintain version tracking across portal updates
Deploy Governance Tracker Agent for automated monitoring
Mine Dropbox folders for RAL documentation
Parse emails for project decisions and context
Deploy Chat Mining Agent for automated extraction
Consolidate into persistent reference library
Communicate clearly about invoice statuses and requirements
Ensure all relevant parties are included in email communications
Follow up on outstanding invoices promptly
Confirm invoice status before escalating issues
Update billing information promptly when changes occur
Provide necessary login credentials securely
Follow up on account details that may require action
Document account setup and credential changes
Document system architecture after vendor departure
Establish governance frameworks for ongoing changes
Create long-term change roadmap
Build architectural resilience through documentation

josie_brewer.name: Josie Brewer
josie_brewer.context: Primary contact for RAL portal issues, invoice requests, and financial documentation

known_issues.subject: Portal Glitch - Federal Income Tax Tab
known_issues.description: Documents in Federal Income Tax tab not populating for years prior to 2024

lexicon.definition: Reinsurance Associates LLC - Insurance portal development project
Next generation reinsurance portal with enhanced governance and architectural resilience
Portal section for accessing federal tax documents by year
lexicon.known_issues: Documents not populating for years prior to 2024 (as of Oct 2025)

lexicon.definition: Smart Software Solutions, Inc. - The company responsible for providing development services related to the RAL Project
A billing status indicating that no charges were incurred during a specific period
A cloud-based email delivery service that provides reliable email delivery and analytics for RAL portal

steps: Identify issue and confirm it's RAL-scoped (portal access, data mismatch, UI bug, invoice view).
Collect evidence (screenshots, error text, affected location(s), timestamps).
Reproduce once to capture exact steps and expected vs actual result.
Create RAL portal ticket with concise title, environment, severity, and business impact.
Tag/notify Josie, Smart, or Michael based on domain (ops, engineering, finance).
Attach artifacts (screens, CSV/XLS sample, logs) and link to related chats or Otter notes.
Set follow-up cadence, capture interim workarounds, and update stakeholders.
Verify fix in portal, close ticket, and log in the RAL bug/lesson tracker.
workflows.context: Use when any RAL portal bug, access problem, or data/UI defect is observed.

steps: Export vendor invoices from source systems for the period (e.g., Sysco).
Normalize line items into a clean spreadsheet (SKU, qty, unit, price, location, date).
Compute variance/ratio checks vs price file or prior week baselines.
Flag anomalies (price drift, missing invoices, duplicate lines) in an exceptions tab.
Escalate anomalies to Michael for finance review and to Smart if system mapping is suspect.
Post adjustments or corrections in the portal/ERP and annotate the audit log.
Archive final workbook to the shared repository with ISO-date naming.
workflows.context: Use for weekly invoice intake, validation, and financial reconciliation.

steps: Mine training feedback and recurring questions from meetings/transcripts.
Define the narrow task scope and audience (manager vs line staff).
Draft a single-page aid (goal, when to use, step-by-step, gotchas, screenshots).
Review with Josie for operational accuracy and language tone.
Publish PDF to the portal knowledge area and link it from training comms.
Track usage/completion; collect field notes for the next revision.
workflows.context: Use when repeated questions emerge or a new/changed process needs quick reference.

steps: When vendor price files are delayed or mismatched, log an exception record.
Apply temporary pricing or hold posting per finance policy.
Notify Michael with affected SKUs/locations and estimated exposure.
Update pricing once files arrive; re-run variance checks.
Close exception with notes and archive artifacts to the period folder.
workflows.context: Use when invoice prices can't be validated at intake due to missing or outdated price files.

workflows.workflow_name: Portal Bug Fix Cycle (Generic RAL Data/UI Issues)
steps: Validate symptoms (which page/field, which entity, who is impacted, error text).
Check last successful action or job run; confirm credentials/roles if access-related.
Attempt safe remediation (cache clear, re-run job, refresh data slice) and capture results.
If systemic, open/augment the RAL ticket with repro steps and scope of impact.
Coordinate with Smart for data/model fixes and with Michael for finance impacts.
Verify the fix across representative records; document root cause and prevention.
Close the ticket and update the RAL bug/lesson tracker.
workflows.context: Use for non-integration-specific RAL portal defects impacting data display, edits, or access.

project_documents: Statement of Work - Phase 2 - RAL Portal v1-0.pdf
core_objectives: System stability and documentation after vendor departure
Long-term change roadmap and architectural resilience

phase_1_actions.action: Mine RAL-related Dropbox folders and emails using Chat Mining Agent
Develop RAL-specific agent schema with governance tracking fields

next_actions: Set up Dropbox API or Zapier for text extraction
Configure Gmail API or Mailparser.io for email parsing

summary_log.notes: Created initial project structure. Awaiting content extraction from mining reports.

Extracted RAL Portal 2.0 context from HCSS_RAL_TGIF mining report. Focus: system stability after vendor departure, governance/risk management, architectural resilience. Deploying Chat Mining + Governance Tracker agents. Mining Dropbox + Email for existing documentation.

Extracted 8 RAL-related emails from REF folder. Added Josie Brewer as primary contact (Controller at RAL). Documented portal glitch (Federal Income Tax tab not showing pre-2024 docs). Captured invoice breakdown request for 5 invoices. Identified Smart and Michael as team members (roles TBD from workflow extraction).

Extracted 4 clean RAL workflows from ChatGPT project: Portal Ticket Triage, Invoice Processing & Reconciliation (weekly), Job Aids Creation, and Invoice Exceptions Handling. Filtered out TGIF contamination (Toast/CrunchTime workflows incorrectly tagged with RAL people). Confirmed Michael and Smart work only on RAL, not TGIF.

Documented chat mappings to separate RAL chats (20251103T09:02, 20251009T21:01) from TGIF chats (20250716T18:19, 20250924T11, 20251031T13:20). Added 5th workflow: Portal Bug Fix Cycle for generic RAL data/UI issues. Fixed file corruption where workflows were embedded in patterns section. Total: 5 workflows, 3 people, 1 issue, 1 invoice request.

summary_log.topic: Forwarded emails extraction - Invoice and billing
summary_log.notes: Extracted 2 forwarded emails from REF folder. (1) RAL invoice status - Becky confirmed SMART is current with invoices, Michael confirmed no invoice for previous week. Need to refactor RAL invoices for Josie. (2) SendGrid billing - Josie updated TextVerified and SendGrid billing to new AMEX, flagged account details needing review. Added patterns for invoice communication and account management. Expanded lexicon with SMART, zero billing, and SendGrid terms.
